meanings.definition: the cognitive process of reaching a decision
examples: a good executive must be good at decision making

meanings.definition: reach, make, or come to a decision about something
examples: We finally decided after lengthy deliberations

meanings.definition: bring to an end; settle conclusively
examples: The judge decided the case in favor of the plaintiff
The father adjudicated when the sons were quarreling over their inheritance
This new development finally decided me!
The vote in New Hampshire often decides the outcome of the Presidential election

meanings.definition: having the power or quality of deciding
